hero.title: Collect, share, and discover Overwatch Workshop codes.
hero.description: A searchable, moderated, low-bandwidth community hub with a dedicated Genji parkour area.

auth.codeSent: Code sent. Please check your inbox.

forms.title: Title
forms.chooseDifficultyHint: Use the Genji parkour community scale
forms.chooseTagsHint: Pick up to 10 tags. Click again to remove.

filters.title: Filter workshop
filters.hint: Filter by the map, tags, type, and difficulty used during upload

ui.reportReasonPlaceholder: For example: broken code, inappropriate content, duplicate submission
ui.reportDetailPlaceholder: Optional, add more context for moderators
ui.reportSent: Report submitted. Thanks for the feedback.

validation.workshopCodeRequired: Please enter a valid workshop code.
validation.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 2 characters.
validation.descriptionTooShort: Description must be at least 10 characters.
validation.levelCountRequired: Level count must be greater than 0.

pages.genjiIntro: A dedicated collection for Genji parkour players, from beginner practice to brutal challenge maps.
pages.uploadSuccess: Submitted for review. It will be public after approval.

profile.uploadCodeHint: Submit normal workshop, training, fun, PVE, and other codes
profile.uploadGenjiHint: Archive parkour maps quickly with map, difficulty, and tags
profile.uploadsHint: Review status, reject notes, and submission history

settings.subtitle: Manage your public identity and account security.
settings.profileHint: Your Game ID appears on uploads, reports, and moderation records.
settings.emailReadonly: Email is used for login and verification. Changing email requires re-verification and is not open yet.
settings.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and numbers.
settings.passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
settings.noChanges: There are no changes to save.

admin.mapsHint: Fix localized names, modes, and image URLs. Broken images are shown here.
admin.rejectNotePlaceholder: Feedback shown to the uploader, such as missing map, short description, or invalid code.
